Index.titleHero1: Standing Together in Faith, Service & Community.
Index.titleHero2: Serving with Purpose, Growing in Faith.
Index.titleHero3: Faith Driven Support for Hearts and Homes.
Index.subtitleHero1: Through faith and fellowship, we uplift communities, heal broken hearts, and build a legacy of hope for generations to come.
Index.subtitleHero2: Every act of love, every hand extended, every life touched — together, we fulfill our calling to be true keepers of one another.
Index.subtitleHero3: We believe that caring for one another is not just a duty, but a sacred opportunity to transform lives and strengthen families.

Body.titleBody1: Improve neighborhood livability by fostering communication and connecting residents with city services, schools, businesses, and community groups.
Body.titleBody3: Engage residents to improve the neighborhood socially, economically, and in quality of life.
Body.titleBody5: The 5PNA engages in lawful activities under Chapter 181 of the Wisconsin Statutes.
Body.titleBody6: 5PNA is always looking for community partners and groups with whom to collaborate.
Body.wwd4: Home Visits/ Door to Door Outreach • Parenting & Life Skills in America, Africa & Beyond • AIDS Epidemic & Character Education
Body.wwd6: Entrepreneurship Development • International Homeownership With Mortgage • Fast Credit Restoration
Body.wwd8: Probation & Parole Workstation • Restoring Foreclosed City Homes • Annual Events to Stop the Killing
Body.wwd10: Comprehensive services designed to uplift and strengthen communities through targeted outreach, education, and development initiatives.
Body.m2: The True Our Brothers Keepers, Inc. Is a faith-based organization that is in the community to put true love into action. Since understanding promotes hope, and hope promotes change, we are a source of hope and a force for change. Our organization is in the business of bridging the gap between inner-city residents and a city full of resources. Finally, we are a community building organization that works toward fulfilling the needs of children and families.
Body.m5: College Scholarship awards in collaboration with Sheedits
Body.m6: All kinds of revenue for programming,outreach, and operations
Body.f2: Turning Ideas to Action - 5 Points Neighborhood Association
Body.f3: A $2,000 Ideas to Action award supported a performing arts event, bringing individuals together to build unity, empathy and opportunity in Milwaukee 5 Points neighborhood and its surrounding neighborhoods. Following the performances,conversations were facilitated over a meal to discusscommonalities and concerns around various topics.
Body.p3: We work with the best Sponsors/Grantors
